name: agentteam-runtime
purpose: Operationalize single-agent / agent-team / cluster orchestration in Loom by absorbing governance protocol, team cockpit, and gate-driven acceptance from three reference models.
scope_articles: Team spec + handoff envelope + gate policy data objects
Cockpit UX requirements (mirror Claude Agent Teams shape, persist as Loom runtime)
out_of_scope: Modifying the chosen model (Fable 5 / Codex / MiniMax / any) itself
Self-approval of permission, safety or model-routing changes
Replacing Loom's existing state machine or evidence pipeline
consumes: boundary-aware-agent skill (for per-agent Blindspot Pass and capability boundary)

verification.phase0_done: validate_team_spec.py + lint_handoff.py can lint the included templates
verification.phase1_done: loom team run CLI creates .loom/runs/<id>/ directory with team.yaml + task-board.yaml
verification.phase2_done: team mailbox + task board rendered in cockpit (CLI or web)
verification.phase3_done: improvement candidates emitted from run traces, none auto-promoted to runtime
